info.title: Dotnet-File-Associator
info.description: C# library and .NET tool for managing file extension associations on Windows 10/11.

commands.name: set
commands.description: Set a file association (requires administrator privileges)

options.name: --pathToExecutable
options.description: Path to the executable to associate.

options.name: --extension
options.description: File extension to associate, with or without the 'dot' (e.g., .abc).

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Remove a file association (requires administrator privileges)

options.name: --pathToExecutable
options.description: Path to the executable to associate.

options.name: --extension
options.description: File extension to associate, with or without the 'dot' (e.g., .abc).

commands.name: check
commands.description: Check if a file association is set (status code: 0 = exists, 1 = doesn't exist)

options.name: --pathToExecutable
options.description: Path to the executable to associate.

options.name: --extension
options.description: File extension to associate, with or without the 'dot' (e.g., .abc).
